query: SELECT MIN(createdAt) as first_order, MAX(createdAt) as last_order, COUNT(*) as total_orders, SUM(CAST(amountUsd AS DECIMAL(18,6))) as total_spent FROM orders; SELECT COUNT(*) as orders_after_est_midnight, SUM(CAST(amountUsd AS DECIMAL(18,6))) as spent_after_est_midnight FROM orders WHERE createdAt >= '2026-03-13 04:00:00';
